Category: COMMUNICATIONS

Availability E, costs 500 euro, no space. A regular cellular phone, but with longer range (can link into urban net­ works from a distance of 20 km). Laser Communic ator: Availability P, costs 7,000 euro., no space. This allows the vehicle to com mun icate with another similarly­ equipped vehicle within line-of-sight.
